title: Rocket pod
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Mobiledefenseturret.jpg|thumb|right|150px|A Zann Consortium MDU with a rocket pod.]]
A '''rocket pod''' was a type of [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]] mounted on [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and vehicles. One variety, found on [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] [[Mobile Defense Unit]], would fire salvos of ten rockets, one from each launcher, at an enemy target. The pod was highly effective against light vehicles such as the [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]]. [[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighter]]-mounted rocket pods lacked guidance systems but carried heavy payloads.

{{Tech-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Galactic Starfighter]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
